sql: SELECT u1.signup_date, u1.id, u1.country_code, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 0
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.id, c1.user_id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 ORDER BY c1.user_id
SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-28 days') ORDER BY f1.follower_id LIMIT 87
SELECT c1.id, c1.post_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 LIMIT 35
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1
SELECT u1.username, u1.is_verified, u1.id FROM users AS u1
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1
SELECT u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code = 'admin'
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id >= 560
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 FULL JOIN posts AS p4 ON c1.post_id = p4.id
SELECT p7.content, p7.user_id, p7.id, p7.posted_at FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p7 ON c1.post_id = p7.id WHERE p7.id >= 925
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u5 ON f1.follower_id = u5.id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 FULL JOIN follows AS f4 ON u1.id = f4.follower_id
SELECT u6.country_code, f1.followee_id, u6.is_verified FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u6 ON f1.follower_id = u6.id WHERE u6.id <= 408
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 RIGHT JOIN likes AS l7 ON p1.id = l7.post_id WHERE l7.post_id <> 846
SELECT u2.id, u2.username, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 FULL JOIN users AS u2 ON f1.follower_id = u2.id WHERE u2.is_verified = 0
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u6 ON c1.user_id = u6.id
SELECT u5.id, f1.followed_at, u5.email, u5.country_code FROM follows AS f1 FULL JOIN users AS u5 ON f1.follower_id = u5.id WHERE u5.email <> 'user7@example.com'
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 LEFT JOIN follows AS f5 ON u1.id = f5.follower_id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.is_verified = 1) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id <= 493
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.view_count = 270) AS derived_table
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.signup_date <= DATETIME('now', '-10 days'))
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM likes AS inner_likes WHERE inner_likes.user_id >= 266) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-23 days')
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM follows AS inner_follows WHERE inner_follows.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-15 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id

INSERT INTO posts (user_id, content, posted_at, view_count) VALUES (790, 'Sample text 50', DATETIME('now'), 142)
INSERT INTO posts (user_id, content, posted_at, view_count) VALUES (277, 'Sample text 60', DATETIME('now'), 586)
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, post_id, comment_text, created_at) VALUES (459, 198, 'Sample text 98', DATETIME('now'))

UPDATE likes SET post_id = 60 WHERE likes.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-13 days')
UPDATE follows SET followed_at = DATETIME('now') WHERE follows.follower_id < 362
UPDATE users SET email = 'updated_user2@example.com' WHERE users.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-17 days')
UPDATE posts SET user_id = 188 WHERE posts.content LIKE '%c'
UPDATE follows SET followee_id = 628 WHERE follows.followee_id <= 227
UPDATE follows SET followee_id = 848 WHERE follows.followee_id >= 874
UPDATE users SET is_verified = 0 WHERE users.is_verified = 0
UPDATE comments SET comment_text = 'Updated text 21' WHERE comments.id < 529
UPDATE follows SET followed_at = DATETIME('now') WHERE follows.follower_id < 816
UPDATE users SET signup_date = DATETIME('now') WHERE users.is_verified = 1
DELETE FROM users WHERE users.is_verified = 1
DELETE FROM posts WHERE posts.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-11 days')
DELETE FROM posts WHERE posts.content = 'user'
DELETE FROM users WHERE users.is_verified = 1
DELETE FROM posts WHERE posts.view_count >= 401
DELETE FROM follows WHERE follows.follower_id >= 859
DELETE FROM comments WHERE comments.comment_text <> '123'
DELETE FROM posts WHERE posts.user_id >= 361
DELETE FROM users WHERE users.username LIKE '%c'
DELETE FROM users WHERE users.country_code LIKE '%a%'
